ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Long-term customer's bill increased $30 due to expired promo. Agent offers $20/month loyalty discount for 12 months.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: My bill went up $30 this month with no explanation.
Agent: Let me pull up your account details.
Customer: I've been a customer for 5 years and my rate has never changed.
Agent: It appears your promotional discount expired last month.
Customer: Nobody told me it would expire. I want the discount back.
Agent: I can offer you a loyalty discount of $20/month for the next 12 months.
